title: The Two Kings of Zou
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on the two kings of zou within the The Two Kings of Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That is the roar of Master Nekoma- Mush!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It appears "the moron of the night" has finally awoke...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Whereze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's time for us to fall back, musketer squad!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We're not going to fight alongside them...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...No, working in shifts is our top priority... doing so will allow us to maintain our stamina while the enemy depletes theirs...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Whereze

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Jack!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The first time I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Whereze

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: I leave you with this... do not assume for one second that you are the only obstinate, stubborn jackass roaming these parts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Because no matter where you go...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: MEDW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: There's plenty of imbeciles abound!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: GRRR MEOOW !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: When the moon shines bright, this country belongs to me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Intruders will be shown no mercy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: RRA AAG GH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Gya AAA A4!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Guardian of the Whale Forest (Duke of the Night) "Master NBKOMUSHI"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He's huge !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This place will be your final resting spot!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Now it's a friggin' monster cat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Gahhh Hihh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: He'd already be digest- ing in my stomach !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: For I am nekomamushi !!! the man who awaits the dawn of this world !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Lordja-ck ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Master, our town !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Don't mind the little things.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Muff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I've been told all the details!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: So you've come in search of a warrior from the Wano Country?

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: ...Lord Jack!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: If a 'Samurai' were stupid enough to set foot on this island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: And if something of the sort happened on my watch...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hencement is

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: The valor of the Mink Tribe! Their counterattack begins!!!

summary: The Two Kings of Zou: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
